content: According to the no-communication theorem, these correlations cannot be used to transmit classical information or messages faster than the speed of light, as the individual measurement results are inherently random
summary: According to the no-communication theorem, these correlations cannot be used to transmit classical information or messages faster than the speed of light, as the individual measurement results are inherently random
